positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric celestial guardian figure, standing triumphantly against a deep cosmic void. The figure is composed of interlocking sacred geometry shapes (like mandalas, octahedrons, and star patterns) rendered in deep indigo, vibrant teal, and metallic gold leaf accents. The pose is majestic and centered, with outstretched arms forming an ethereal archway. Elements of glowing nebulae and faint stardust trail behind the figure, creating strong radial symmetry. The composition should utilize high contrast for print fidelity, with clean, bold lines suitable for screen printing on apparel. Minimal detail outside the main structure, focusing on clean silhouettes and intricate internal patterns. Fantasy art style, highly detailed illustration, graphic novel aesthetic, volumetric lighting, centered composition, print-on-demand art.
negative: blurry, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logos, disfigured, grayscale, muddy colors
